data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of including a photo/video release within the same form as part of the liability waiver. However, the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met, as it only states that the form includes a photo/video release without providing concrete API reads or persisted state checks to verify its implementation. The lack of specific evidence or endpoints demonstrating the presence of the photo/video release in the actual form leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the photo/video release within the same form.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify photo/video release in waiver form
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the waiver form includes a section for photo/video release.
